warnings: Missing legal opinion or legal document URL
notes: CFG is classified as a protocol governance / RWA infrastructure token, not as a direct asset-backed RWA claim token.
Reserve-related blockers are expected under the current grading engine because the engine assumes asset-backed instruments with backing, custodian, reserve breakdown, and redemption asset fields.
Do not fill reserve fields with artificial values only to raise the grade. Use null fields where the concept is not applicable.
Future improvement: add an asset-type-aware grading path for governance/infrastructure tokens so not-applicable reserve fields are treated differently from missing evidence.
nextActions: Decide whether CFG should remain in the main asset universe or move to an RWA infrastructure / governance token segment.
Map holder count and holder concentration from Etherscan or another reliable on-chain analytics source.
Map on-chain liquidity depth and major DEX/CEX markets before raising liquidity confidence.
Find exact token or protocol audit reports before raising smartContractRisk.
Consider updating the grading engine to support asset types such as asset_backed_token, fund_share_token, pool_token, governance_token, and infrastructure_protocol.
